query:
SELECT 
  m.id AS mappingId,
  m.ploId,
  pl.code AS ploCode,
  m.competencyId,
  c.code AS competencyCode,
  p2.nameEn AS programName,
  m.weight
FROM mappings m
JOIN competencies c ON m.competencyId = c.id
JOIN plos pl ON m.ploId = pl.id
JOIN programs p2 ON pl.programId = p2.id
WHERE m.competencyId IN (
  SELECT m2.competencyId
  FROM mappings m2
  JOIN plos pl2 ON m2.ploId = pl2.id
  GROUP BY m2.competencyId, pl2.programId
  HAVING SUM(m2.weight) > 1.001
)
ORDER BY m.competencyId, pl.programId, m.weight DESC;

SELECT 
  m.id AS mappingId,
  m.ploId,
  pl.code AS ploCode,
  m.competencyId,
  c.code AS competencyCode,
  p2.nameEn AS programName,
  m.weight
FROM mappings m
JOIN competencies c ON m.competencyId = c.id
JOIN plos pl ON m.ploId = pl.id
JOIN programs p2 ON pl.programId = p2.id
WHERE m.competencyId IN (
  SELECT m2.competencyId
  FROM mappings m2
  JOIN plos pl2 ON m2.ploId = pl2.id
  GROUP BY m2.competencyId, pl2.programId
  HAVING SUM(m2.weight) > 1.001
)
ORDER BY m.competencyId, pl.programId, m.weight DESC;
